Name: Jessica's Ontology Series-v3
Description: Rulebook generated from Airtable base 'Jessica's Ontology Series-v3'.

schema.name: Title
schema.Description: Human-readable name for the workflow. Maps to dct:title per Dublin Core.

schema.name: Description
schema.Description: Detailed description of the workflow purpose and scope. Maps to dct:description per Dublin Core.

schema.name: Created
schema.Description: Date the workflow was created. Maps to dct:created per Dublin Core.

schema.name: Modified
schema.Description: Date the workflow was last modified. Maps to dct:modified. Used to identify stale workflows per NTWF CQ5.

schema.name: Identifier
schema.Description: External reference identifier (e.g., ticket number). Maps to dct:identifier. Join key to operational systems.

schema.name: WorkflowSteps
schema.Description: Steps contained in this workflow. Inverse of IsStepOf. Maps to ntwf:hasStep.

schema.name: CountOfWorkflowSteps
schema.Description: Count of steps in this workflow. Aggregation over IsStepOf relationship.

data.Title: Production Deployment Workflow
data.Description: End-to-end workflow for deploying software releases to production, including risk analysis, legal clearance, and release approval. From Jessica Talisman's NTWF ontology article.

schema.name: Label
schema.Description: Human-readable name for the step. Maps to rdfs:label.

schema.name: SequencePosition
schema.Description: Ordinal position in workflow sequence. Maps to ntwf:sequencePosition (functional). Supports positional ordering queries.

schema.name: RequiresHumanApproval
schema.Description: Whether this step requires a human agent. Maps to ntwf:requiresHumanApproval. Answers NTWF CQ3.

schema.name: IsStepOf
schema.Description: Parent workflow containing this step. Inverse of WorkflowSteps. Maps to ntwf:isStepOf.

schema.name: AssignedRole
schema.Description: Role responsible for this step. Maps to ntwf:assignedRole (functional). Implements role-agent separation.

schema.name: IsStepOfTitle
schema.Description: Denormalized lookup of parent workflow title.

schema.name: IsStepOfDescription
schema.Description: Denormalized lookup of parent workflow description.

schema.name: IsStepOfIdentifier
schema.Description: Denormalized lookup of parent workflow external identifier.

schema.name: AssignedRoleLabel
schema.Description: Denormalized lookup of assigned role label.

schema.name: AssignedRoleComment
schema.Description: Denormalized lookup of assigned role comment/description.

schema.name: AssignedRoleFilledBy
schema.Description: Denormalized lookup of agent currently filling the assigned role.

schema.name: ApprovalGate
schema.Description: Approval gate attached to this step, if any. Establishes double-typing per article.

schema.name: StepDurationMinutes
schema.Description: Expected duration of the step in minutes. Maps to ntwf:stepDurationMinutes.

schema.name: ProducesArtifact
schema.Description: Artifact produced by this step. Maps to ntwf:producesArtifact. Aligned with prov:generated.

schema.name: RequiresArtifact
schema.Description: Artifact required as input to this step. Maps to ntwf:requiresArtifact. Aligned with prov:used.

schema.name: ConsumesDataset
schema.Description: Dataset consumed by this step. Maps to ntwf:consumesDataset. Answers NTWF CQ8.

data.Label: Risk Assessment
data.IsStepOfDescription: End-to-end workflow for deploying software releases to production, including risk analysis, legal clearance, and release approval. From Jessica Talisman's NTWF ontology article.
data.AssignedRoleComment: Role responsible for risk assessment. In full ontology, filled by AI agent.

data.Label: Legal Review
data.IsStepOfDescription: End-to-end workflow for deploying software releases to production, including risk analysis, legal clearance, and release approval. From Jessica Talisman's NTWF ontology article.
data.AssignedRoleComment: Role responsible for legal and compliance review of releases.

data.Label: Release Approval
data.IsStepOfDescription: End-to-end workflow for deploying software releases to production, including risk analysis, legal clearance, and release approval. From Jessica Talisman's NTWF ontology article.
data.AssignedRoleComment: Primary role responsible for coordinating production releases. First in delegation chain. Article CQ2: 'filled by Maria Gonzalez'

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display name of the approval gate. Maps to rdfs:label.

schema.name: Description
schema.Description: Description of what this gate approves and its criteria.

schema.name: WorkflowStep
schema.Description: The workflow step that this gate is attached to. Establishes double-typing.

schema.name: EscalationThresholdHours
schema.Description: Hours that may elapse before delegation chain activates. Maps to ntwf:escalationThresholdHours.

data.Name: Release Approval Gate
data.Description: Final approval gate before production deployment. Requires Release Manager sign-off. Step 3 in the Production Deployment Workflow. When approval is pending beyond threshold, escalates via delegation chain.

data.Name: Release Approval Gate
data.Description: Final approval gate before production deployment. Requires Release Manager sign-off. Step 3 in the Production Deployment Workflow. When approval is pending beyond threshold, escalates via delegation chain: Release Manager -> VP Engineering -> CTO.

data.Name: Financial Review Gate
data.Description: Approval gate for financial data in QBR. Requires Financial Analyst sign-off before executive summary can be prepared. Escalates to CFO if pending beyond threshold.

schema.name: Label
schema.Description: Human-readable name for the role. Maps to rdfs:label.

schema.name: Comment
schema.Description: Description of the role's responsibilities. Maps to rdfs:comment.

schema.name: Department
schema.Description: Department that owns this role. Maps to org:memberOf.

schema.name: FilledBy
schema.Description: Agent currently filling this role. Maps to ntwf:filledBy. The change-management triple - update this when personnel change.

schema.name: WorkflowSteps
schema.Description: Steps assigned to this role. Inverse of AssignedRole.

schema.name: CountOfWorkflowSteps
schema.Description: Count of workflow steps assigned to this role.

schema.name: DelegatesTo
schema.Description: Role to escalate to when this role's agent is unavailable. Maps to ntwf:delegatesTo. Enables delegation chain queries.

schema.name: FilledByName
schema.Description: Denormalized lookup of agent name (foaf:name) filling this role.

schema.name: FilledByMBox
schema.Description: Denormalized lookup of agent email (foaf:mbox) filling this role.

schema.name: DelegatedToBy
schema.Description: Inverse of DelegatesTo. Role that delegates to this role.

data.Label: Release Manager
data.Comment: Primary role responsible for coordinating production releases. First in delegation chain. Article CQ2: 'filled by Maria Gonzalez'

data.Label: Legal Compliance Reviewer
data.Comment: Role responsible for legal and compliance review of releases.

data.Label: Risk Analyst
data.Comment: Role responsible for risk assessment. In full ontology, filled by AI agent.

data.Label: VP Engineering
data.Comment: Secondary role in delegation chain. Escalation from Release Manager when primary agent unavailable. Article CQ6.

data.Label: CTO
data.Comment: Final role in delegation chain. Ultimate authority for release decisions. Article CQ6.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Full name of the person. Maps to foaf:name per FOAF ontology.

schema.name: TypeOfAgent
schema.Description: Agent type classification: human, ai, or automatedpipeline. Determines which NTWF subclass applies.

schema.name: Roles
schema.Description: Roles filled by this agent. Inverse of FilledBy.

schema.name: Description
schema.Description: Description of the agent's purpose and capabilities.

schema.name: ModelVersion
schema.Description: AI model version string. Maps to ntwf:modelVersion. Only applicable to AIAgent type. Domain declaration means applying this to a HumanAgent would incorrectly infer AIAgent type.

schema.name: Mbox
schema.Description: Email address of the person. Maps to foaf:mbox per FOAF ontology. Used for contact and identity resolution.

schema.name: CountOfRoles
schema.Description: Count of roles currently filled by this agent.

schema.name: ProducedArtifacts
schema.Description: Artifacts attributed to this agent. Maps to inverse of prov:wasAttributedTo.

schema.name: ProcessedDatasets
schema.Description: Datasets processed by this agent (for AI agents). Inverse of ProcessedBy.

data.Name: Maria Gonzalez
data.Description: Human Release Manager

data.Name: RiskAnalysis-AI
data.Description: AI agent responsible for automated risk assessment. Processes Q1 2026 Risk Metrics dataset and produces Risk Report artifact. Article CQ8 demonstrates this agent's dataset processing. Subclass of prov:SoftwareAgent.

data.Name: CI Pipeline
data.Description: Continuous Integration pipeline responsible for automated build, test, and deployment execution. Fills the Deployment Engineer role for automated deployment steps.

data.Name: Maria Gonzalez
data.Description: Senior Release Manager responsible for coordinating production deployments. Primary point of contact for release approval. Article CQ2 answer.

data.Name: James Okafor
data.Description: VP of Engineering. Second in delegation chain for release approvals.

data.Name: David Kim
data.Description: CTO. Final authority in delegation chain for release decisions.

data.Name: Sarah Chen
data.Description: Legal Compliance Reviewer. Reviews releases for regulatory compliance.

data.Name: Robert Williams
data.Description: General Counsel. Senior legal authority for escalations.

data.Name: Michael Torres
data.Description: Financial Analyst responsible for reviewing financial metrics in QBR.

data.Name: Jennifer Park
data.Description: CFO responsible for executive summaries and final financial sign-off.

data.Name: CI Pipeline
data.Description: Continuous Integration pipeline responsible for automated build, test, and deployment execution. Fills the Deployment Engineer role for automated deployment steps. Subclass of prov:SoftwareAgent and schema:SoftwareApplication.

data.Name: ETL Pipeline
data.Description: Extract-Transform-Load pipeline responsible for data collection and aggregation for business reviews.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display name of the artifact. Maps to rdfs:label.

schema.name: Description
schema.Description: Description of the artifact's content and purpose.

schema.name: ProducedBy
schema.Description: Workflow step that produces this artifact. Maps to ntwf:producedBy.

schema.name: SequencePosition
schema.Description: Position in the artifact provenance chain.

schema.name: Title
schema.Description: Display name of the artifact. Maps to dct:title.

schema.name: Identifier
schema.Description: External reference identifier (document ID, ticket number). Maps to dct:identifier. Join key to document management system.

schema.name: Created
schema.Description: Date the artifact was created. Maps to dct:created.

schema.name: GeneratedBy
schema.Description: Workflow step that produced this artifact. Maps to prov:wasGeneratedBy.

schema.name: AttributedTo
schema.Description: Agent responsible for producing this artifact. Maps to prov:wasAttributedTo.

schema.name: DerivedFrom
schema.Description: Upstream artifact this was derived from. Maps to prov:wasDerivedFrom. Forms provenance chain.

data.Name: Risk Report
data.Description: Automated risk assessment output produced by the RiskAnalysis-AI agent. First artifact in the provenance chain.

data.Name: Legal Clearance
data.Description: Legal compliance sign-off document produced after legal review. Certifies release meets regulatory requirements.

data.Name: Release Authorization
data.Description: Formal authorization to proceed with production deployment. Produced by Release Manager at the approval gate.

data.Name: Deployment Log
data.Description: Technical log of deployment execution including timestamps, systems affected, and any errors encountered.

data.Name: Post-Deployment Report
data.Description: Final report summarizing deployment outcome, metrics, and any follow-up items. Closes the workflow.

data.Name: artifact-risk-report
data.Description: Automated risk assessment output produced by the RiskAnalysis-AI agent. First artifact in the production deployment provenance chain. Contains risk scores, identified vulnerabilities, and mitigation recommendations.
data.Title: Risk Report

data.Name: artifact-legal-clearance
data.Description: Legal compliance sign-off document produced after legal review. Certifies release meets regulatory requirements. Derived from Risk Report analysis.
data.Title: Legal Clearance

data.Name: artifact-release-authorization
data.Description: Formal authorization to proceed with production deployment. Produced by Release Manager at the approval gate. Derived from Legal Clearance.
data.Title: Release Authorization

data.Name: artifact-deployment-log
data.Description: Technical log of deployment execution including timestamps, systems affected, commands executed, and any errors encountered. Produced by CI Pipeline.
data.Title: Deployment Log

data.Name: artifact-post-deployment-report
data.Description: Final report summarizing deployment outcome, metrics, and any follow-up items. Closes the production deployment workflow.
data.Title: Post-Deployment Report

data.Name: artifact-raw-data-export
data.Description: Aggregated raw data from multiple source systems for QBR analysis. Produced by ETL Pipeline from sales and incident datasets.
data.Title: Raw Data Export

data.Name: artifact-metrics-analysis
data.Description: AI-generated analysis of business metrics including trends, anomalies, and risk indicators. Produced by RiskAnalysis-AI from raw data export.
data.Title: Metrics Analysis Report

data.Name: artifact-financial-summary
data.Description: Financial analysis and summary prepared by Financial Analyst. Includes revenue, costs, and profitability metrics.
data.Title: Financial Summary

data.Name: artifact-qbr-presentation
data.Description: Final quarterly business review presentation for executive stakeholders. Synthesizes all prior artifacts into actionable insights.
data.Title: QBR Executive Presentation

schema.name: FromStep
schema.Description: The step that comes BEFORE (source of the precedes edge).

schema.name: ToStep
schema.Description: The step that comes AFTER (target of the precedes edge).

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display name of the dataset. Maps to dct:title.

schema.name: Description
schema.Description: Description of the dataset's content and source.

schema.name: ProcessedBy
schema.Description: AI agent that processes this dataset. Inverse of ProcessesDatasets.

schema.name: TimePeriod
schema.Description: Time period the dataset covers (e.g., 'Q1 2026').

schema.name: Title
schema.Description: Display name of the dataset. Maps to dct:title.

schema.name: Modified
schema.Description: Date the dataset was last modified. Maps to dct:modified.

schema.name: Publisher
schema.Description: Department that publishes/owns this dataset. Maps to dct:publisher.

schema.name: ConsumedByStep
schema.Description: Workflow step(s) that consume this dataset. Inverse of ConsumesDataset.

data.Name: Q1 2026 Risk Metrics
data.Description: Quarterly risk metrics dataset containing historical deployment data, incident reports, and risk indicators. Processed by RiskAnalysis-AI to produce Risk Report. Article CQ8 answer.

data.Name: dataset-risk-metrics-q1
data.Description: Quarterly risk metrics dataset containing historical deployment data, incident reports, and risk indicators. Processed by RiskAnalysis-AI to produce Risk Report. Article CQ8 answer: 'What datasets does the quarterly business review consume?'
data.Title: Q1 2026 Risk Metrics

data.Name: dataset-sales-q1
data.Description: Quarterly sales data including revenue by product line, customer segments, and regional breakdown.
data.Title: Q1 2026 Sales Data

data.Name: dataset-incidents-q1
data.Description: Quarterly incident and outage data including severity, resolution time, and root cause analysis.
data.Title: Q1 2026 Incident Reports

data.Name: dataset-financials-q1
data.Description: Quarterly financial data including P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow statements.
data.Title: Q1 2026 Financial Statements

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Human-readable name of the department. Maps to rdfs:label.

schema.name: Description
schema.Description: Description of the department's function and responsibilities.

schema.name: Roles
schema.Description: Roles owned by this department. Inverse of Department on Roles.

schema.name: CountOfRoles
schema.Description: Count of roles owned by this department.

schema.name: PublishedDatasets
schema.Description: Datasets published by this department. Inverse of Publisher.

data.Name: Engineering
data.Description: Software engineering department responsible for development, deployment, and technical operations. Owns Release Manager, VP Engineering, CTO, Risk Analyst, Deployment Engineer, and Data Engineer roles.

data.Name: Legal
data.Description: Legal and compliance department responsible for regulatory review and legal clearance. Owns Legal Compliance Reviewer and General Counsel roles. Article CQ7: 'Which workflows involve both Engineering and Legal?'

data.Name: Finance
data.Description: Finance department responsible for financial analysis, reporting, and executive summaries. Owns Financial Analyst and CFO roles.

schema.name: Name
schema.Description: Display name of the AI agent. Maps to schema:name.

schema.name: Description
schema.Description: Description of the AI agent's purpose and capabilities.

schema.name: Agents
schema.Description: Agents of this type. Inverse of TypeOfAgent.

schema.name: OntologyClass
schema.Description: Corresponding NTWF/external ontology class.

schema.name: Superclasses
schema.Description: Parent classes in ontology hierarchy.

data.Name: Human
data.Description: AI agent responsible for automated risk assessment. Processes Q1 2026 Risk Metrics dataset and produces Risk Report artifact. Article CQ8 demonstrates this agent's dataset processing.

data.Name: AI
data.Description: AIAgents - Autonomous AI systems that can fill roles. Subclass of ntwf:Agent. Distinguished from HumanAgents by having ModelVersion instead of foaf:mbox.

data.Name: Human Agent
data.Description: Human individuals who can fill roles in workflows. Have legal standing in organizational processes. Carry foaf:name and foaf:mbox properties. Only agent type that can fill roles where requiresHumanApproval is true.

data.Name: AI Agent
data.Description: Autonomous AI systems that can fill roles. Produce probabilistic outputs that may require human review. Carry ntwf:modelVersion property for audit purposes. Distinguished from HumanAgents by having ModelVersion instead of foaf:mbox.

data.Name: Automated Pipeline
data.Description: Deterministic software pipelines that execute predefined rules. Produce deterministic outputs according to predefined rules. Distinguished from AIAgent by schema:SoftwareApplication alignment.

_meta._CMCC_Summary: Airtable export with schema-first type mapping: Schemas, Data, Relationships (FK links), Lookups (INDEX/MATCH), Aggregations (SUMIFS/COUNTIFS/Rollups), and Calculated fields (formulas) in Excel dialect. Field types are determined from Airtable's schema metadata FIRST (no coercion), with intelligent fallback to formula/data analysis only when schema is unavailable.

_conversion_metadata.field_type_mapping: checkbox→boolean, number→number/integer, multipleRecordLinks→relationship, multipleLookupValues→lookup, rollup→aggregation, count→aggregation, formula→calculated

type_inference.priority: airtable_metadata (NO COERCION) → formula_analysis → reference_resolution → data_analysis (fallback only)
type_inference.airtable_type_mapping: checkbox→boolean, singleLineText→string, multilineText→string, number→number/integer, datetime→datetime, singleSelect→string, email→string, url→string, phoneNumber→string
type_inference.data_coercion_hierarchy: Only used as fallback when Airtable schema unavailable: datetime → number → integer → boolean → base64 → json → string
